Terms of Service

Last updated: June 2025

1. Agreement to Terms

By accessing or using https://www.plumbinglocalpros.com, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part of the terms, you may not access the service.

2. Description of Service

Plumbing Local Pros is a free referral service that assists homeowners and businesses in connecting with independent local plumbing professionals. We do not provide plumbing services directly.

3. Independent Contractors

All plumbing contractors dispatched through our service network are independent contractors and are not employees or agents of Plumbing Local Pros. It is the responsibility of the independent contractor to provide you with the necessary licensing, insurance, and warranties for their work. Plumbing Local Pros does not guarantee or warrant any work performed by these independent contractors.

4. Disclaimer of Liability

Plumbing Local Pros shall not be held liable for any damages, claims, or losses arising out of or related to the plumbing services provided by the independent contractors. Any disputes regarding the quality of work, pricing, or damages must be resolved directly with the contractor who performed the service.

5. Governing Law

These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of the United States, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

Plumbing Local Pros

Professional local plumbing services across the United States. Available same day and 24/7 for emergencies — drain cleaning, water heater repair, pipe repair, toilet & faucet installation, sewer line services and more.

  • Drain Cleaning
  • Water Heater
